case_title: AMISH PATEL VS. DESHAUN WILLLIAMS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, AMISH AS TO DEFENDANT WILLLIAMS, DESHAUN DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
